proposed.title: DekBAB 2026 Applications Now Open
proposed.summary: DekBAB is now accepting applications for volunteers to join as Liaisons, Artist Crew, and Docents. Applications are open from 1 July – 1 August 2026.

proposed.title: New Additions to the Artist Line-Up
proposed.summary: New additions to the artist line-up announcement. No specific dates provided, but usually announced in November for BAB events.

proposed.title: Nairobi International College Fair 2026
proposed.summary: Nairobi International College Fair 2026 is happening on Fri 16 Oct 2026 from 10:00 AM onwards at Villa Rosa Kempinski, Nairobi.

proposed.title: 5th International Mega Clima KENYA HVAC R Expo
proposed.summary: 5th International Mega Clima KENYA HVAC R Expo is happening on Tue 13 Oct 2026 from 10:00 AM onwards at The Sarit Expo Centre, Nairobi.

proposed.title: Pre-registration - Africa Real Estate Summit Awards &amp Expo 2026
proposed.summary: Pre-registration - Africa Real Estate Summit, Awards &amp Expo 2026, Nairobi is happening on Sat 28 Nov 2026 from 9:00 AM onwards at Best Western Plus Meridian Hotel, Nairobi.
